title: Add isTokenExpired utility to token-utils.ts
description: Create isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean in src/auth/token-utils.ts that decodes a JWT (base64url decode of payload) and checks if the exp claim is less than current Unix timestamp. Add co-located tests.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts: Uses base64urlDecode() to decode JWT body and access payload.exp for expiry checking — reuse same decoding pattern
src/auth/jwt-service.test.ts: Uses vitest describe/it/expect pattern with beforeEach setup — reuse same test structure
